title: Risk-on options tape offsets uneven news catalysts
summary: Fact: The strongest direct news/options alignment in the held portfolio is in IBRX and FLY, where company-specific catalysts are paired with bullish ThetaData flow. Fact: MSFT has a bearish policy read-through from the AI sovereign-wealth-fund bill, but its options tape is firmly bullish, so the news and ThetaData diverge. Inference: The portfolio tape is broadly risk-on because 9 held names screened bullish and none screened bearish in the latest ThetaData market scan, but several of those signals lack fresh matching news. Watch items should focus on whether direct catalysts confirm the options strength, especially in FLY, IBRX, QS, TTD, BULL, and MSFT.

markdown:
# Risk-on options tape offsets uneven news catalysts

Generated: 2026-06-24T08:02:07.103780+00:00
Portfolio as of: 2026-06-22T12:23:48Z

Fact: The strongest direct news/options alignment in the held portfolio is in IBRX and FLY, where company-specific catalysts are paired with bullish ThetaData flow. Fact: MSFT has a bearish policy read-through from the AI sovereign-wealth-fund bill, but its options tape is firmly bullish, so the news and ThetaData diverge. Inference: The portfolio tape is broadly risk-on because 9 held names screened bullish and none screened bearish in the latest ThetaData market scan, but several of those signals lack fresh matching news. Watch items should focus on whether direct catalysts confirm the options strength, especially in FLY, IBRX, QS, TTD, BULL, and MSFT.

## Daily Analysis - My Stocks
- Opportunity IBRX: pick_score=85 confidence=0.69 theta_adjusted=0.79 - IBRX drew attention after a report highlighted an exclusive Japan BCG deal alongside an upcoming FDA workshop on Anktiva.
- Opportunity IBRX: pick_score=79 confidence=0.58 theta_adjusted=0.68 - A separate report said IBRX's CEO outlined three reasons the bull case remains intact even after the stock fell 10% for the week.

Outcome tracking: every 5 trading days. Judge every active pick every 5 trading days, append a new outcome snapshot, and keep the original pick_score immutable.
